positive: A maximalist geometric pattern featuring stylized mythological creatures woven with bioluminescent, alien flora. The design must be highly symmetrical and contained within the frame, centered on a stylized pair of celestial beasts (like phoenix or griffin) amidst intricate geometric patterns of crystalline jungle vines and glowing cosmic dust. Use a deep color palette of sapphire blue, rich violet, emerald green, and vibrant gold accents. The overall style should be Neo-Art Nouveau mixed with vaporwave synthwave aesthetics, characterized by strong, clean silhouettes, high contrast, and crisp linework suitable for direct apparel printing. Vector illustration quality, perfect symmetry, clean edges, no shading gradient complexity, highly detailed, symmetrical, central composition.
negative: blur, blurry, text, watermark, logo, signature, artifact, cropped, low detail, noise, messy, jpeg artifacts, extra limbs, bad anatomy, disfigured, poorly drawn, out of frame
